"[1] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 07:34PM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2981 (N), Longitude -118.0058 (W).NowResponders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1610 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +14243877072. The user requests help with a SICKNESS OR INJURY emergency.NowThis request is for SOMEONE ELSE. The person in need is BREATHING WITH DIFFICULTY. The person in need IS conscious. The specific emergency is INJURY. The user describes the specific emergency as OTHER, but did not provide further information. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. TCC or PSAP systems may garble this language's script. Return messages to the user will not be garbled. This concludes the initial data. Two-way text with the user is now available.Now"
